title: Time tracker settings - only one tracker to run at a time
excerpt: We are using the time tracker to run timesheets and at the moment it is possible to run two trackers simultaneously. We would really like an option for starting the tracking for one item to automatically stop any other t…

posts.author: StephRH (Steph King)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using the time tracker to run timesheets and at the moment it is possible to run two trackers simultaneously. We would really like an option for starting the tracking for one item to automatically stop any other tracking already running.
